text.title: System Design Process Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the system-design-process methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: phase1-understand
step.action: Capture problem statement, stakeholders, success criteria, scope.

step.name: phase2-scope-nfrs
step.action: Translate NFRs to numeric values; back-of-envelope capacity.

step.name: phase3-design
step.action: Author C4 L1 + L2; capture key ADRs (datastore, comms, deployment).

step.name: phase4-validate
step.action: Capacity sanity, anti-pattern scan, peer review with independent senior.
step.decision-gate: Peer review missing or blocking → reject.

step.name: phase5-document
step.action: Compose architecture package + ADR list; publish.
